did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper uses a custom-built noncontact photoacoustic and optical coherence tomography (AOPA/OCT) system for in vivo imaging. The analysis involves quantitative metrics, linear regression, Bland-Altman analysis, and ROC analysis to correlate imaging biomarkers with histopathology. There is no mention of using artificial intelligence, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms for segmentation, classification, or diagnosis; the diagnostic accuracy is derived from statistical analysis of imaging parameters.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
